chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-654 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 07.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present constitution petition and submits that the petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after obtaining a new disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Under these circumstances, the present constitution petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
